message:
fix(gui): replace WezTerm branding with FrankenTerm throughout GUI

Update user-visible strings: app menu name, about dialog, quit menu item,
help URLs (→ Dicklesworthstone/frankenterm), debug overlay version label,
OpenGL init log, window title, and update notifications. Remove unused
CellAttributes import from debug overlay.
